title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: s390utils bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for s390utils is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The s390utils packages contain a set of user-space utilities that should be used together with the zSeries (s390) Linux kernel and device drivers.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): RHEL10.0 - libekmfweb: Fix gen of cert or CSR to use RSA not RSA-PSS (s390utils/s390-tools) [rhel-10.0.z] (JIRA:RHEL-115829)  RHEL10.0 - chpstat: Fix DPU utilization scaling in reports (s390utils/s390-tools) [rhel-10.0.z] (JIRA:RHEL-115838)  RHEL10.0 - zkey: Fix CCA host version detection for newer CCA versions (s390utils/s390-tools) [rhel-10.0.z] (JIRA:RHEL-115850)

full_text:
An update for s390utils is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The s390utils packages contain a set of user-space utilities that should be used together with the zSeries (s390) Linux kernel and device drivers.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): RHEL10.0 - libekmfweb: Fix gen of cert or CSR to use RSA not RSA-PSS (s390utils/s390-tools) [rhel-10.0.z] (JIRA:RHEL-115829)  RHEL10.0 - chpstat: Fix DPU utilization scaling in reports (s390utils/s390-tools) [rhel-10.0.z] (JIRA:RHEL-115838)  RHEL10.0 - zkey: Fix CCA host version detection for newer CCA versions (s390utils/s390-tools) [rhel-10.0.z] (JIRA:RHEL-115850)
